name: Cheese Puff Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat shortening and water to boiling point.
2. Sift together flour, RUMFOLD BAKING POWDER, salt, and cayenne.
3. Pour the sifted mixture into the boiling liquid.
4. Stir vigorously until the mixture clings together in a mass and leaves the sides of the pan.
5. Beat in the grated cheese.
6. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition until the mixture is smooth.
7. Drop the batter by spoonfuls onto a greased (or sprayed) baking sheet.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F - 350°F) for 30 minutes.
After baking several times, I've found that these muffins are wonderful when baked only 30 minutes. They have a more soft, cheesy taste but are also wonderfully browned. They pair well with tomato or cheese soup.
